name: openai-mcp
description: Generate and edit images with gpt-image-2, and get a second opinion from ChatGPT — all from your Claude conversation.
long_description:
Two capabilities in one package, one API key to set up.

Image generation: describe what you want and Claude generates it using OpenAI's gpt-image-2 image model. Paste an image into the chat to edit it — gpt-image-2 processes all image inputs at high fidelity automatically. Results appear inline in the conversation and are saved to ~/Downloads. Supports a wide range of resolutions including up to 4K (3840x2160), with 'auto' mode letting the model pick the best size and quality for your prompt.

ChatGPT critique: stuck on a hard decision or want a second opinion? Claude can send its reasoning to GPT-4o and get back a structured adversarial critique — Flaws, Blind spots, Alternatives, Counterarguments, Strengths, and an Overall assessment.
